comment: Full-viewport tile-grid regression cases for moderate zoom / high iteration configs. Each case is expanded by run-grid.mjs into every tile of the visible grid for the given viewport, replicating the Leaflet layout in client/js/MandelbrotLayer.ts (200px tiles centered on the origin point). grid-z36-i51200-report is the user-reported URL; the others are the nearest direct/high-iter and perturbation/high-iter points from the main corpus (corpus.json).

cases.note: Reported URL: mandelbrot.site/?re=...&z=36&i=51200; direct pathway, very high iterations
Closest corpus neighbor: direct/high-iter just under the perturbation threshold
Corpus direct/high-iter at moderate zoom, near the cusp
Corpus perturbation-f64/high-iter just past the threshold; exercises paired delta loop

Heaviest real pf64 view (62% interior, escaper mean 49.7k/50k trapped needle channel): ~100 s wall per grid pass on 7 workers, so it adds ~100 s per round per variant to an e2e run — use --filter to skip it during iteration; it is the ship-gate case for the heavyweight pf64 regime (added 2026-07-08, LOG items 1-4 entry)
Corpus float-exp/high-iter: covers the pathway the opt3+simd128 flag change targets
